caption: The video appears to be a presentation discussing various sources of funds that can be utilized for a specific purpose, likely related to municipal or community development. The slide titled "What funds can be used?" lists several funding options arranged around a central hexagon labeled "IZ." These options include real estate transfer fees, special bylaw/ordinance payments, CPA (Community Preservation Act) funds, municipal bonds, developer negotiated fees, cell phone tower lease payments, short-term rental fees, tax title sales, general fund/free cash, donations, and tax overrides. Additionally, there is a mention of marijuana taxes as a potential funding source. The slide notes that these funds are commonly managed through a municipal account overseen by the municipal treasurer. The presenter, visible in a small inset window, seems to be explaining the details of these funding mechanisms.
